title: equilabium viphyense subsp. zebrarum
intro: Equilabium viphyense subsp. zebrarum is a lesser-known plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including the potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Equilabium viphyense subsp. zebrarum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
intro_study: According to "Scientific reports", equilabium viphyense subsp. zebrarum benefits may include improved shoot length, total alkaloid, essential oil percentage, and antioxidant activity when treated with specific selenium concentrations, such as 4 mg L^-1 sodium selenate.
